questions.prompt: 在英语中，什么是不规则动词（irregular verb）？
options: A verb that does not form its past tense by adding "-ed" or "-d".
A verb that changes its spelling only when used with plural subjects.
A verb that always stays the same as its base form.
A verb that can only be used in negative sentences.
questions.explanation: 不规则动词是指其过去式或过去分词变化不遵循词尾加 -ed/-d 的规则，而是有独特的变化形式（例如 go -> went, see -> saw, buy -> bought）。
questions.hint: 过去式不以 -ed 结尾的动词。

questions.prompt: 以下哪项包含了动词 see, go, feed 的正确过去式？
questions.explanation: see 的过去式是 saw；go 的过去式是 went；feed 的过去式是 fed。它们都是常见的不规则动词变化。
questions.hint: see -> saw, go -> went, feed -> fed。

questions.prompt: 补全对话："Did you buy anything made of ivory?" — "No, I ____ (buy) a wooden carving instead."
questions.explanation: buy 的过去式是不规则变化 bought。brought 是 bring（带来）的过去式，应注意区分。
questions.hint: buy 的过去式是 bought（b-o-u-g-h-t）。

questions.prompt: 补全对话："What did the ugly duckling become at the end of the story?" — "It ____ a beautiful white swan."
questions.explanation: 根据故事的语境（过去的事情），用一般过去时。become 的过去式是不规则的 became。
questions.hint: become 的过去式是 became（o变成a）。

questions.prompt: 补全对话："Where did you leave your pencil box?" — "I ____ it in my locker. Luckily, Anne lent me her pen."
questions.explanation: 根据上下文，我把铅笔盒“留下/忘在（left）”了储物柜。leave 的过去式是不规则的 left。lost 是 lose（丢失）的过去式。
questions.hint: leave（留下，离开）的过去式是 left。

questions.prompt: 以下哪个不规则动词过去式的拼写是错误的？
questions.explanation: find（找到）的过去式是不规则变化 found，而非 finded。其余三项均为正确变化。
questions.hint: find 的过去式是 found。

questions.prompt: 补全对话："Who ____ you how to play this play last month?" — "Our English teacher did."
questions.explanation: 根据时间状语 last month，动作发生在过去，teach（教）的过去式是 taught。
questions.hint: teach 的过去式是 taught。

questions.prompt: 选出最恰当的过去式形式完成句子："We ____ (have) a great lunch. I ____ (eat) a fish sandwich."
questions.explanation: 两句话都在描述过去的经历。have 的过去式是 had，eat 的过去式是 ate。两空均填过去式。
questions.hint: have -> had; eat -> ate。

questions.prompt: 动词 "read"（原形读音为 /ri:d/）的过去式是什么？
questions.explanation: 动词 read（读）过去式拼写依然是 read，但发音从 /ri:d/ 变为 /red/（与颜色 red 读音相同）。
questions.hint: 过去式拼写不变，但读音改变为 /red/。

questions.prompt: 补全对话："Did you hear the announcement at school?" — "Yes, we ____ (hear) it clearly. We had to turn off our phones."
questions.explanation: hear（听到）的过去式是不规则的 heard（在原形后加 d）。
questions.hint: hear 变过去式加 d，拼写为 heard。

questions.prompt: 一般过去时中（不含 be 动词）否定句的正确结构是什么？
questions.explanation: 一般过去时否定句结构是：“主语 + didn't (did not) + 动词原形”。因为 didn't 已经体现了过去时，后面的实义动词必须用原形。
questions.hint: didn't 后面必须用动词原形。

questions.prompt: 补全对话："Did you see the monkeys at the zoo?" — "No, we ____. We saw the wolves instead."
questions.explanation: 对 Did you... 提问的过去时一般疑问句，否定回答使用 didn't。完整回答是 No, we didn't.
questions.hint: Did 提问，didn't 答。

questions.prompt: 完成句子："I ____ (not write) a diary entry yesterday because I was too tired."
questions.explanation: 因为有 yesterday，句子是一般过去时。否定句使用 didn't + 动词原形 write。C项 didn't wrote 是错误的双重过去时。
questions.hint: 一般过去时否定用 didn't + 动词原形。

questions.prompt: 一般过去时中如何构成一般疑问句？
questions.explanation: 一般过去时疑问句结构是：“Did + 主语 + 动词原形...?”。句首用了助动词 Did，后面的动词必须还原为原形。
questions.hint: Did 提到句首，后面的动词还原为原形。

questions.prompt: 补全对话："Did Sally wear her own clothes to school yesterday?" — "No, she ____. She had to wear her uniform."
questions.explanation: 对 Did Sally wear... 进行否定回答是 No, she didn't. 后面解释了原因“她不得不穿校服”。
questions.hint: 疑问句是 Did 开头，否定回答用 didn't。

questions.prompt: 补全对话："____ you see the ugly duckling fly away?" — "Yes, I did. It became a beautiful swan."
questions.explanation: 答语中 Yes, I did 提示问句是以 Did 开头的一般疑问句。Did 后接动词原形 see，完全吻合。
questions.hint: 根据答语的 did 回答，问句首用 Did。

questions.prompt: 以下哪个句子包含语法错误？
options: Did you found your science textbook in the locker?
We didn't go to school last Saturday.
He didn't want to show us the map.
Did they play a chain story in class?
questions.explanation: B项中 Did you found... 错误。句首已经用了助动词 Did，后面的动词应该用原形 find，而不是过去式 found。应改为 Did you find...。
questions.hint: Did 后面的动词不能用过去式，必须用动词原形。

questions.prompt: 补全对话："Why did the dog Xiaohua stay alert?" — "Because she ____ (hear) some strange noises."
questions.explanation: 问句用 did 提问过去的动作。答语用过去式。hear 的过去式是不规则变化 heard。
questions.hint: 表示过去的原因，动词 hear 变过去式为 heard。

questions.prompt: 补全对话："Where did you hang out with friends last weekend?" — "____. We studied in the library."
options: We didn't hang out last weekend.
We hang out in the park.
questions.explanation: 问句是特殊疑问句（Where...），不能用 Yes/No 答复。后面的“我们在图书馆学习”表明实际上没有闲逛，所以选择“我们上周末没有闲逛（We didn't hang out last weekend.）”最合适。
questions.hint: 排除 Yes/No 的回答，结合上下文，我们没有出去闲逛。

questions.prompt: 一般过去时中（不含 be 动词）特殊疑问句的正确结构是什么？
questions.explanation: 一般过去时的特殊疑问句结构为：“疑问词 + did + 主语 + 动词原形 ？”。同样需要动词原形形式。
questions.hint: 疑问词后接 did，然后是主语和动词原形。
